scripts.lint: eslint src --max-warnings 9999 && npm run lint:booking-token-gate && npm run lint:booking-plan-gate && npm run lint:i18n-fallback-gate && npm run lint:i18n-locale-gate && npm run lint:i18n-parity && npm run lint:i18n-max-lines && npm run lint:i18n-english-leak
scripts.lint:booking-token-gate: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root='src/components/public-booking';const files=[];const walk=(dir)=>{for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){const full=path.join(dir,entry.name);if(entry.isDirectory()) walk(full);else if(full.endsWith('.tsx')) files.push(full);}};walk(root);const re=/#(?:[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8})\b/g;const bad=[];for(const file of files){const content=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8');if(re.test(content)) bad.push(file);re.lastIndex=0;}if(bad.length){console.error('Inline hex colors are not allowed in public-booking TSX components.');console.error(bad.join('\n'));process.exit(1);}"
scripts.lint:booking-plan-gate: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root='src/components/public-booking';const files=[];const walk=(dir)=>{for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){const full=path.join(dir,entry.name);if(entry.isDirectory()) walk(full);else if(full.endsWith('.tsx')) files.push(full);}};walk(root);const bad=[];for(const file of files){const content=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8');if(content.includes('salon.plan')) bad.push(file);}if(bad.length){console.error('Public booking UI components must not read salon.plan.');console.error(bad.join('\n'));process.exit(1);}"
scripts.lint:i18n-fallback-gate: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const targets=['src/app/(marketing)','src/app/login/page.tsx','src/app/login-2fa/page-client.tsx','src/app/login-admin/page.tsx','src/app/book/[salon_slug]/confirmation/page-client.tsx','src/components/public-booking/BookingSelectionSection.tsx','src/components/public-booking/BookingCustomerSection.tsx','src/components/public-booking/BookingSummaryCard.tsx','src/components/public-booking/BookingFlowSection.tsx','src/components/public-booking/MobileBookingSummary.tsx','src/components/public-booking/index.tsx','src/components/signup/SignupForm.tsx','src/app/onboarding/page.tsx','src/app/not-found.tsx'];const files=[];for(const target of targets){if(!fs.existsSync(target)) continue;const stat=fs.statSync(target);if(stat.isDirectory()){for(const file of fs.readdirSync(target)){if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(file)) files.push(target+'/'+file);}}else{files.push(target);}}const re=/\|\|\s*['\"][^'\"]*\s+[^'\"]*['\"]/;const bad=[];for(const file of files){const content=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8');if(re.test(content)) bad.push(file);}if(bad.length){console.error('Fallback text (|| \"...\") is not allowed in localized public UI files.');console.error(bad.join('\n'));process.exit(1);}"
scripts.lint:i18n-locale-gate: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const content=fs.readFileSync('src/i18n/public-pages/compose.ts','utf8');const locales=['en','nb','ar','so','ti','am','tr','pl','vi','zh','tl','fa','dar','ur','hi'];const missing=locales.filter((l)=>!new RegExp('\\\\b'+l+':').test(content));if(missing.length){console.error('Missing locale entries in src/i18n/public-pages/compose.ts:',missing.join(', '));process.exit(1);}"
